evidence: "This one is an historical treasure and should not be missed."
"Thoroughly enjoyable way to spend an evening or afternoon. BBC adaptation."
"Great cast, great writing, lots of plot twists and turns. Very nuanced characters."
"Character development of all cast members, really well done by writers and actors working together."
"Had to watch Season 7 Premiere several times to figure out what was going on!"
"It's porn disguised as a Wall Street story. Not sexy. Just gross."
"Great script, great casting, great acting, great directing!"
"The acting is great--DeNiro, Jack Nicholson, Robert Mitchum, Tony Curtis."
"Meryl Streep, as always, nailed the accent on this one, reminding me of one of my sisters-in-law."
"Congratulations to Barry Pepper as Bobby for his Emmy win as Best Lead Actor."
"Great acting. Great story lines. Well written. Worth checking out."
"Everytime I view it, I learn something new, see something I had not seen before."
"This alone made my membership worth it."
"I love it even more as an adult on DVD."

summary: The user has a strong preference for historical dramas and thrillers, appreciating complex narratives and high production quality. They show loyalty to notable actors and directors, and their reviews reflect a deep emotional engagement with the content.
